# Aleksandr Teymurazov

> Engineering leader building trusted CI/CD, Quality Intelligence, AI-driven validation, and delivery observability for enterprise software organizations.

Personal site of Aleksandr Teymurazov — operating principles, work experience, accomplishments, and the AT Quality Intelligence (ATQI) framework. Long-form essays live on the companion site at https://atqi.dev.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, hero, principles, accomplishments, experience, framework, insight, education, and contact.
- [Blog](/blog): Teaser index pointing to the Engineering Quality Journal now hosted at https://atqi.dev.

## Related sites

- [atqi.dev](https://atqi.dev): The Engineering Quality Journal — essays on the ATQI framework, CI/CD trust, AI-assisted validation, and software quality engineering, authored by Aleksandr Teymurazov.
